resources.string: Shrink the board to exclude margins

When \"Gesture Navigation\" is enabled, as it is on this device, it is difficult to drag tiles near the edge of the screen. So CrossWords can be configured to draw the board and tray a bit narrower.
\n\nThe current setting is “%1$s”. You can change this behavior anytime in the “%2$s” section of %3$s, or go there now via the button below. (Changes will take effect next time you open a game.)
